full_text:
Zhang Ju 張舉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ju (張舉)was born in Yuyang. Led revolt against the Han, he ravaged the northeast and declared himself ruler. Zhang Ju was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
